case_title: STEVE WALKUP VS. LEONARD L. CONNER III ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF STEVE WALKUP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LEONARD L CONNER AND LEONARD L. CONNER III ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WALKUP, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER III, LEONARD L. CONNER, LEONARD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $70. SERVED MAR-02-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER III, LEONARD L.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $70. SERVED MAR-02-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONNER, LEONARD A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKUP, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNER III, LEONARD L. CONNER, LEONARD A. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,215.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
